title: Sera', Tel (entry in: The New Encyclopedia of Archaeological Excavations in the Holy Land)
author: Eliezer D. Oren
allowedUseNotes: Copyrighted encyclopedia entry. Summaries in project's own words only.
summary: Report on Tel Sera' (Tell esh-Shari'a) in the western Negev, excavated by Oren 1972–1979, long discussed as a leading candidate for biblical Ziklag on geographic and stratigraphic grounds.
confidenceNotes: TO VERIFY (M1): entry pagination and the history of who first proposed the Ziklag identification for this site.
